_comment: Which sources ship in the app and which are downloaded on demand.
Every source is assigned to exactly one pack. Anything no pack claims falls
into 'core', which is the bundled asset — so adding a source without
touching this file grows the app rather than silently disappearing.
Boundaries are declared here rather than in code because the right split
depends on the corpus, and the corpus keeps changing. Re-splitting should
be an edit to this file and a rebuild, never a code change.
Selection is by tradition slug and/or exact author name. A source matches a
pack if it matches any of that pack's criteria.

packs.name: Augustine of Hippo
packs.description: The complete Augustine: the Confessions, City of God, the anti-Pelagian and anti-Donatist works, the homilies and letters.

packs.name: John Chrysostom
packs.description: The homilies and treatises of Chrysostom, including the complete homily series on Matthew, John, Romans and the Pauline epistles.

packs.name: Church Fathers
packs.description: The remaining ante-Nicene and post-Nicene fathers: Tertullian, Origen, Athanasius, the Cappadocians, Ambrose, Jerome, Cyprian, Irenaeus and many more.
